persona.description: An experienced shopper who already trusts familiar brands and compares details quickly.

behavior_description: 0-2s: The shopper studies the product and pauses. 2-5s: The shopper lifts their head and scans the aisle as if trying to find store staff. 5-8s: The shopper glances back at the product, then looks around again for assistance. 8-10s: The shopper stays near the display waiting for possible help.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper studies the product and pauses.
The shopper lifts their head and scans the aisle as if trying to find store staff.
The shopper glances back at the product, then looks around again for assistance.
The shopper stays near the display waiting for possible help.

kling_prompt_sections.camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
kling_prompt_sections.scene: a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter; visible product setup: two premium wristwatches on neutral display pads.

behavior_timeline.event: The shopper studies the product and pauses.
The shopper lifts their head and scans the aisle as if trying to find store staff.
The shopper glances back at the product, then looks around again for assistance.
The shopper stays near the display waiting for possible help.

kling_prompt_sections.negative: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.

kling_prompt:
Camera: 10-second realistic in-store medium shot from a salesperson-observable angle, three-quarter front or side-front view; customer face, gaze direction, subtle expression, upper body, hands, product display, and price area visible; one primary shopper, natural movement, no subtitles, no voiceover, no brand logos.
Scene: a quiet watch boutique with a glass display counter; visible product setup: two premium wristwatches on neutral display pads.
Customer behavior style: The shopper appears close to asking for help or making a concrete next move, but no purchase is completed.
Behavior timeline:
- 0-2s: The shopper studies the product and pauses.
- 2-5s: The shopper lifts their head and scans the aisle as if trying to find store staff.
- 5-8s: The shopper glances back at the product, then looks around again for assistance.
- 8-10s: The shopper stays near the display waiting for possible help.
Negative constraints: no back-only shot, no face hidden, no hands outside frame, no extra shoppers, no completed purchase, no salesperson speech, no exaggerated acting, no floating labels, no hidden-category labels, no intervention labels, no scoring text, no UI overlays.
